speaker: charlie
text: Thanks Sam, perfect day for sport which brings us nicely to what's happening tonight. The NBA playoffs are absolutely cooking right now with two Game 7s today, including some cracking matchups that could go either way.

speaker: alice
text: Game 7s are just pure magic, Alex. All that pressure, season on the line, everything you've worked for comes down to 48 minutes. And we've got Barcelona closing in on the La Liga title after beating Osasuna 2-1 yesterday - they could actually wrap it up today.

speaker: charlie
text: Plus there's the PGA Tour action at Doral where Cameron Young's got a handy lead heading into the final round. Nothing quite like Sunday arvo golf when someone's trying to close out a tournament win.
